race.description: Follow Cork Racecourse On Social Media Handicap (0-60)
race.comment: LAUNCH TIME (6) arrives off the back of a comfortable victory at Leopardstown a fortnight ago when wearing first time cheekpieces. They seemed to make a real difference he he looks hard to oppose. TERO D'ROSA (8) remains a maiden but has been in good form this winter with two placed efforts at Dundalk. Not seen since November. Respect. SWISS ARMY OFFICER (16) is well exposed compared to a lot of this field. Finished last season with a solid second at Killarney. One to consider. NIBRAS RAINBOW (10) has been in patchy form on the all-weather through the winter. One to take seriously revisiting turf.
